title: CIRI’s Nov. 13 blood drive collected 20 units of blood
summary: CIRI’s Nov. 13 blood drive collected 20 units of blood from 21 donors. Blood Bank of Alaska officials say that blood could potentially save the lives of 60 Alaskans. summary: The final numbers are in, and your contributions helped CIRI raise $79,143 during its 2008 United Way campaign. We beat our goal of $70,000. Last year CIRI raised $79,545. title: CIRI’s dividend policy states that the total CIRI dividend payment
summary: CIRI’s dividend policy states that the total CIRI dividend payment to shareholders in any given year is equal to 3.25 percent of the total shareholders’ equity, calculated as of Dec. 31 of the prior year. 2009 dividend amounts will likely be calculated shortly before the date of record for the first...
